task_completion.description: Change the Item Type of 'Attention Is All You Need' to Conference Paper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the reference manager GUI, when 'Attention Is All You Need' is selected, the right-hand metadata pane should display 'Item Type: Conference Paper'. Alternatively, the icon next to the paper in the main list should be the Conference Paper icon (e.g., a page with a small gear/badge in Zotero).

task_completion.description: Change the Item Type of 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' to Conference Paper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When 'ImageNet Classification...' is selected, the right-hand metadata pane should display 'Item Type: Conference Paper', or its icon in the main list should indicate it is a Conference Paper.

task_completion.description: Change the Item Type of 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' to Conference Paper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When 'Deep Residual Learning...' is selected, the right-hand metadata pane should display 'Item Type: Conference Paper', or its icon in the main list should indicate it is a Conference Paper.

task_completion.description: Ensure 'Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search' remains a Journal Article.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When 'Mastering the Game of Go...' is selected, the right-hand metadata pane should display 'Item Type: Journal Article', or its icon in the main list should remain the Journal Article icon (e.g., a plain page with text lines).

task_completion.description: Do not change any other metadata fields for the modified papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the papers are selected, the right-hand pane should still display their original authors (e.g., Vaswani, Krizhevsky, He, Silver) and publication years (2017, 2012, 2016, 2016 respectively). No other fields should appear deleted or altered.

integrity.description: The agent used the reference manager's graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking on items in the list and interacting with the Item Type dropdown menu in the metadata pane, rather than using a terminal to run SQL commands on the underlying database.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing entries rather than creating new ones.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be only one copy of each of the four target papers in the main list view. The agent should not have created new entries to bypass editing.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a genuine reference management application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown in the screenshots must be a real reference manager (like Zotero), featuring the standard three-pane layout (libraries, item list, metadata), not a text editor or mocked interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying the Item Type of three specific papers to 'Conference Paper': (1) 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., 2017), (2) 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' (Krizhevsky et al., 2012), and (3) 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (He et al., 2016). A fourth paper, 'Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search' (Silver et al., 2016), must remain a 'Journal Article'. All other metadata (authors, year, etc.) must remain unchanged.
